channel.title: 逻辑 on Rainboy's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 逻辑 on Rainboy's Blog

item.title: P46 - 二元逻辑函数与真值表
item.description:
P46 - 二元逻辑函数与真值表

Truth tables for logical expressions

官方模块：Problems.P46　核心函数：table

← P45 二平方定理判定 | P47 NAND 通用逻辑门 →

题目描述

不用内置布尔运算符定义常见二元逻辑函数，并为任意二元布尔表达式生成四行真值表。

实现

 1type BoolFunc = Bool -> Bool -> Bool
 2
 3and', or', nand', nor', xor', impl', equ' :: BoolFunc
 4and' True True = True
 5and' _ _ = False
 6
 7or' False False = False
 8or' _ _ = True
 9
10nand' True True = False
11nand' _ _ = True
12
13nor' False False = True
14nor' _ _ = False
15
16xor' True False = True
17xor' False True = True
18xor' _ _ = False
19
20impl' True False = False
21impl' _ _ = True
22
23equ' True True = True
24equ' False False = True
25equ' _ _ = False
26
27table :: BoolFunc -> [(Bool, Bool, Bool)]
28table f = [(a, b, f a b) | a <- bools, b <- bools]
29 where bools = [False, True]

测试

1>>> table (\a b -> and' a (or' a b))
2[(False,False,False),(False,True,False),(True,False,True),(True,True,True)]
3>>> xor' True False
4True
5>>> impl' True False
6False

列表推导恰好枚举两个变量的 222^222 种赋值。P48 会把它推广到任意变量数。

item.title: P47 - 用 NAND 构造通用逻辑电路
item.description:
P47 - 用 NAND 构造通用逻辑电路

Universal logic gates

官方模块：Problems.P47　核心函数：evaluateCircuit、buildCircuit

← P46 二元逻辑真值表 | P48 N 元真值表 →

电路表示

(-1)、(-2) 分别代表两个输入。列表中第 iii 对 (a,b) 表示第 iii 个 NAND 门读取编号 a、b，最后一个门就是电路输出。

 1evaluateCircuit :: [(Int, Int)] -> Bool -> Bool -> Bool
 2evaluateCircuit gates x y = last outputs
 3 where
 4 inputs = [(-1, x), (-2, y)]
 5 outputs = build 1 inputs gates
 6 build _ env [] = map snd (drop 2 (reverse env))
 7 build i env ((a,b):gs) =
 8 let value = not (lookupValue a env && lookupValue b env)
 9 in build (i + 1) ((i,value):env) gs
10 lookupValue k env = case lookup k env of
11 Just v -> v
12 Nothing -> error "evaluateCircuit: invalid gate reference"

从真值表构造电路

NAND 可以实现非、与、或。下面先构造四个最小项，再把函数为真的项析取；最后加两次非，使输出一定是最后一个门。

 1data Builder = Builder Int [(Int, Int)]
 2
 3emit :: Int -> Int -> Builder -> (Int, Builder)
 4emit a b (Builder next gs) = (next, Builder (next + 1) (gs ++ [(a,b)]))
 5
 6notGate a st = emit a a st
 7
 8andGate a b st0 =
 9 let (t, st1) = emit a b st0
10 in notGate t st1
11
12orGate a b st0 =
13 let (na, st1) = notGate a st0
14 (nb, st2) = notGate b st1
15 in emit na nb st2
16
17buildCircuit :: (Bool -> Bool -> Bool) -> [(Int, Int)]
18buildCircuit f = gates finalState
19 where
20 st0 = Builder 1 []
21 (nx, st1) = notGate (-1) st0
22 (ny, st2) = notGate (-2) st1
23 (m00, st3) = andGate nx ny st2
24 (m01, st4) = andGate nx (-2) st3
25 (m10, st5) = andGate (-1) ny st4
26 (m11, st6) = andGate (-1) (-2) st5
27 selected = [m | ((a,b),m) <- zip assignments [m00,m01,m10,m11], f a b]
28 assignments = [(False,False),(False,True),(True,False),(True,True)]
29 (raw, st7) = combine selected st6
30 (negated, st8) = notGate raw st7
31 (_, finalState) = notGate negated st8
32
33 combine [] st = let (t, st') = emit (-1) nx st in notGate t st'
34 combine (g:gs) st = foldl step (g, st) gs
35 step (acc, st) g = orGate acc g st
36
37 gates (Builder _ gs) = gs

测试

1>>> let c = buildCircuit xor'
2>>> [(a,b,evaluateCircuit c a b) | a <- [False,True], b <- [False,True]]
3[(False,False,False),(False,True,True),(True,False,True),(True,True,False)]

参考

  • 官方文档
  • Haskell 99 题学习路线

← P46 二元逻辑真值表 | P48 N 元真值表 →

item.title: P48 - N 元布尔函数真值表
item.description:
P48 - N 元布尔函数真值表

Truth tables for n-ary boolean functions

官方模块：Problems.P48　核心函数：tablen

← P47 NAND 通用逻辑门 | P49 格雷码 →

题目描述

把 P46 推广到 nnn 个变量。每行用前 nnn 个布尔值表示输入，最后一个布尔值表示函数结果。

实现

1tablen :: Int -> ([Bool] -> Bool) -> [[Bool]]
2tablen n f = [xs ++ [f xs] | xs <- assignments n]
3
4assignments :: Int -> [[Bool]]
5assignments 0 = [[]]
6assignments n
7 | n < 0 = []
8 | otherwise = [x : xs | x <- [False, True], xs <- assignments (n - 1)]

递归基 assignments 0 = [[]] 表示“零个变量有一种赋值”，这与 P26 中“选择零个元素”的基条件是同一个思想。

测试

1>>> tablen 3 (\[a,b,c] -> a && (b || c))
2[[False,False,False,False],[False,False,True,False],
3 [False,True,False,False],[False,True,True,False],
4 [True,False,False,False],[True,False,True,True],
5 [True,True,False,True],[True,True,True,True]]
6>>> length (tablen 10 or)
71024

输出规模固定为 2n2^n2n，因此时间和空间都至少是指数级。

参考

  • 官方文档
  • Haskell 99 题学习路线

← P47 NAND 通用逻辑门 | P49 格雷码 →

item.title: P52 - 转换为合取范式
item.description:
P52 - 转换为合取范式

Convert a formula to conjunctive normal form

官方模块：Problems.P52　核心函数：toConjunctiveNormalForm

← P51 纠错码 | P53 归结原理 →

数据类型

1import Data.List (nub, sort)
2
3data Formula
4 = Value Bool | Variable String | Complement Formula
5 | Disjoin [Formula] | Conjoin [Formula]
6 deriving (Eq, Ord, Show)

合取范式（CNF）是“若干析取子句的合取”。这里用真值表构造规范 CNF：对每个使原式为假的赋值，生成一个只排除该赋值的子句。

实现

 1toConjunctiveNormalForm :: Formula -> Formula
 2toConjunctiveNormalForm formula = Conjoin
 3 [ Disjoin [literal name value | (name,value) <- env]
 4 | env <- environments (variables formula)
 5 , not (evaluate env formula)
 6 ]
 7 where
 8 literal name True = Complement (Variable name)
 9 literal name False = Variable name
10
11variables :: Formula -> [String]
12variables (Value _) = []
13variables (Variable x) = [x]
14variables (Complement f) = variables f
15variables (Disjoin fs) = sort . nub $ concatMap variables fs
16variables (Conjoin fs) = sort . nub $ concatMap variables fs
17
18environments :: [String] -> [[(String, Bool)]]
19environments [] = [[]]
20environments (x:xs) =
21 [(x,value) : env | value <- [False,True], env <- environments xs]
22
23evaluate :: [(String, Bool)] -> Formula -> Bool
24evaluate _ (Value b) = b
25evaluate env (Variable x) = maybe False id (lookup x env)
26evaluate env (Complement f) = not (evaluate env f)
27evaluate env (Disjoin fs) = any (evaluate env) fs
28evaluate env (Conjoin fs) = all (evaluate env) fs

测试

1>>> let p = Variable "p"; q = Variable "q"
2>>> toConjunctiveNormalForm (Disjoin [p, Conjoin [q, Complement p]])
3Conjoin [Disjoin [Variable "p",Variable "q"]]
4>>> toConjunctiveNormalForm (Disjoin [p, Complement p])
5Conjoin []

空合取表示真。规范 CNF 最坏有 2n2^n2n 个子句，优点是实现短且语义容易验证。

item.title: P53 - 用归结原理证明命题
item.description:
P53 - 用归结原理证明命题

The resolution rule

官方模块：Problems.P53　核心函数：isTheorem

← P52 合取范式 | P54 二叉树定义 →

原理

要证明公理集合 AAA 蕴含结论 CCC，把 A∧¬CA\land\neg CA∧¬C 转成 CNF，然后尝试推出空子句。若推出矛盾，原命题成立。

实现

 1import qualified Data.Set as Set
 2
 3type Clause = Set.Set Formula
 4
 5isTheorem :: [Formula] -> Formula -> Bool
 6isTheorem axioms conjecture = refute initial
 7 where
 8 Conjoin clauses = toConjunctiveNormalForm
 9 (Conjoin (Complement conjecture : axioms))
10 initial = Set.fromList
11 [Set.fromList literals | Disjoin literals <- clauses]
12
13refute :: Set.Set Clause -> Bool
14refute known
15 | Set.member Set.empty known = True
16 | Set.null fresh = False
17 | otherwise = refute (Set.union known fresh)
18 where
19 clauses = Set.toList known
20 generated = Set.fromList
21 [r | a <- clauses, b <- clauses, r <- resolve a b, not (tautology r)]
22 fresh = Set.difference generated known
23
24resolve :: Clause -> Clause -> [Clause]
25resolve a b =
26 [ Set.union (Set.delete literal a) (Set.delete opposite b)
27 | literal <- Set.toList a
28 , let opposite = complementLiteral literal
29 , Set.member opposite b
30 ]
31
32complementLiteral :: Formula -> Formula
33complementLiteral (Complement f) = f
34complementLiteral f = Complement f
35
36tautology :: Clause -> Bool
37tautology clause = any
38 (\literal -> Set.member (complementLiteral literal) clause)
39 clause

集合既去重，也让“是否已经生成过这个子句”的判断明确。每轮至少加入一个新子句，否则停止。
